ValidationRule.description: 特別手数料、複数社へ支払う場合必須
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( OR( SpecialOrGeneral_MAX__c = '特別', SpecialOrGeneral_MIN__c = '特別' ), OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Agency1StoreName__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Agency2Name__c)) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Agency1StoreName__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Agency3Name__c)) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Agency2Name__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Agency3Name__c)) ) ) ), ISBLANK(EvaluationComment__c), NOT(Creating__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 申請理由・評価コメントは必須です
